title: Permissions
subtitle: Tool confirmation, timeouts, and desktop automation access

toolExecution.sectionDescription: Confirmation and timeout settings when tools run in a session.

computerUse.sectionDescription: In the Sparo OS desktop app, the assistant can capture the screen and control the mouse and keyboard; requires a multimodal model for vision.
computerUse.enableDesc: When off, the ComputerUse tool stays disabled in every session mode.
computerUse.desktopOnly: Computer use settings are only available in the Sparo OS desktop app.

browserControl.sectionDescription: Connect Sparo OS to your Chromium-family browser through the local debugging port.
browserControl.desktopOnly: Browser control settings are only available in the Sparo OS desktop app.
browserControl.statusDesc: Sparo OS uses port 9222 to control browser tabs directly through CDP.
browserControl.restartFailed: Failed to restart browser with debugging enabled
browserControl.createLauncherDesc: Create a macOS launcher that starts the browser with the CDP debugging port enabled.

restartModal.title: Restart browser?
restartModal.description: {{browser}} is already running without the debugging port. Sparo OS needs to restart it with debugging enabled before it can control tabs.
restartModal.warning: This will close current browser windows and reopen the browser.
